title: Flipkart's Challenge in Effective Inventory Management
hints: This is a classic greedy scheduling problem similar to 'Job Scheduling with Deadlines'.
Sort items by their deadline (A[i]) in ascending order.
Use a min heap to maintain the profits of selected items.
For each item, if we can still add it (heap size < deadline), add it to the heap.
If the heap is full but current item has higher profit than the minimum in heap, replace it.
The key insight: at time t, we can only have at most t+1 items selected.
Sum all profits in the heap and return modulo 10^9 + 7.
